fields.title: Tell Us About Your Event
fields.body: The more you tell us, the more accurate your quote will be. Don't worry if you're not sure about everything yet. We can work out the details together.

fields.name: start_date
fields.label: Event start date
fields.note: If your date is flexible, leave this blank and leave details on the next page

fields.name: event_type
fields.label: Type of event
fields.note: Select 'Other' if your event type is not listed

fields.title: Your Contact Details
fields.body: Nearly done. Tell us who to send the quote to. We'll get back to you within 24 hours, usually much sooner.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Tell us about your event
fields.placeholder: eg Branding requirements, setup times, questions about games, or anything else
fields.note: Please provide any details you think will help us prepare your quote or learn more about your event
